calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Stanley Goff, Esq. for Plaintiff. Counsel states that Plaintiff filed a complaint against both Recology and Kathy Jameson who works for Recology based on her conduct as an employee of Recology. Counsel advises that Defendants filed a demurrer to have the entire action dismissed with prejudice, which was subsequently granted by the court without leave to amend on Jan-19-2016. Court agrees that OSC should be taken off-calendar in light of the court's ruling on Jan-19-2016 and judgment dated Feb-24-2016. ***NOTE: Sanctions against Stanley Goff for failure to appear at the Order to Show Cause hearing on May-17-2016 are vacated in open court.*** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2016 Continued To Aug-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Aug-16-2016 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Continued To Apr-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Pro tem; Douglas Robbins Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/JPT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stanley Goff of Law Offices of Stanley Goff telephone number 415-571-9570 for Plaintiff Daryle Washington.
Rod Fliegel of Littler Mendelson, P.C. telephone number 415-439-6253 for Defendant Recology San Francisco.

Counsel for the plaintiff informed the Court that an amended complaint was filed yesterday. The parties argued the issue of whether or not the amended complaint was filed timely under SB 383. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is provide a formal form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
